title: Genetic Counseling - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Genetic Counseling 3 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ST LUKE'S CLINIC EASTERN OREGON MEDICAL ASSOCIATES EASTERN OREGON MEDICAL ASSOCIATES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Clinic provides full spectrum medical care including physicals, women’s health, diabetes management, mental health services, obstetrics and family planning. Clinic also offers car seat inspections. Regular visits from the mobile mammography unit and specialists in cardiology, oncology, and genetic counseling for cancer. Van transportation is available to take cancer patients to and from their appointments. 3950 17th Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm, Saturday 8am-noon (urgent medical care only) (541) 523-1001 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WOMEN'S CARE CENTER FOR GENETICS AND MATERNAL-FETAL MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides obstetrics, gynecology, and genetic counseling services for high-risk pregnancies. 3355 Riverbend Drive Suite 210 Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (541) 349-7600 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON ASHLAND WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a full range of Gynecological care. Services include pap tests, menopause counseling and therapy, bladder surgery, premenstrual therapy, fertility evaluation and treatment and pregnancy testing. Transgender hormone therapy, STD counseling and treatment, contraceptives and genetic counseling services offered. Does not offer obstetric services. 595 N Main Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as female age 10 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm (541) 479-8363 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST LUKE'S CLINIC EASTERN OREGON MEDICAL ASSOCIATES EASTERN OREGON MEDICAL ASSOCIATES WOMEN'S CARE CENTER FOR GENETICS AND MATERNAL-FETAL MEDICINE WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES
